description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a male Mallard duck, characterized by its vibrant iridescent green head, yellow bill, and a distinct white ring around its neck. The body is robust and covered in brown feathers with a lighter chest and underbelly, while the wings display a mix of brown, black, and blue with white accents. The tail feathers are short and slightly curled, and the legs and webbed feet are a bright orange. The eyes are dark and alert, giving the duck a natural, attentive expression. The overall form is plump and rounded, typical of a healthy adult Mallard. This duck would be commonly seen in urban parks, ponds, or grassy areas near water.
description: A realistic male Mallard duck with a green head, yellow bill, brown body, and orange webbed feet, displaying natural feather detail and coloration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green head, yellow bill, white neck ring, and symmetrical orange feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the iridescent green head, brown body, blue wing patch, and orange legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, layered brown feathers, and curled tail feathers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the green head, brown body, and detailed wing structure.
